title: Migrate server-side atomic keepers to shared helper
description: Pure import swap. Three atomic write callsites already use the local atomicWriteText (server/services/_shared.ts) — switch to importing from @fenglimg/fabric-shared/node/atomic-write directly. _shared.ts re-export already preserved by TASK-001 for files not migrated yet. No behavioral change.
scope: Layer 1 foundation — atomic helper migration (server side)

files.change: Lines 93, 94: swap atomicWriteText import from ./relative ./_shared to @fenglimg/fabric-shared/node/atomic-write

criteria: _shared.ts re-export still works for any not-yet-migrated callers
No behavioral change in writes (same tmp+rename pattern)
